scoring-irt-lines.rationale: NFR32 — scoring engine cognitive-load cap (~250 LOC). Solo-dev must be able to mind the whole auditable scoring engine end-to-end.

css-components-lines.rationale: NFR32 — total CSS body across components (~1500 LOC). Beyond this, design-system complexity exceeds solo-dev review budget.

app-modules-bytes.rationale: NFR32 — assessment SPA modules budget (~30 KB raw). Aligned with NFR21 vanilla-ES2022 + NFR33 zero-runtime-dep posture. test-hook.js is dev-time-only (activated by ?test=1; Story 3-7) — excluded from production-modules accounting.

i18n-harness-bytes.rationale: NFR32 — i18n harness footprint (~15 KB raw). Locale loader is a runtime harness in Domain A; budget kept tight per NFR33.

methodology-pages-en.rationale: NFR32 — EN methodology corpus page count (~30/locale). Larger corpora drift outside per-corpus-release review capacity.

methodology-pages-ru.rationale: NFR32 — RU methodology corpus page count (~30/locale). Mirrors EN budget; activates when Epic 7 lands RU content.

methodology-pages-pl.rationale: NFR32 — PL methodology corpus page count (~30/locale). Mirrors EN budget; activates when Epic 7 lands PL content.
